reasoning: The reference stock price on 2026-01-02 was 121.93, which represents an all-time/52-week high generated by a sharp 2.1% single-day spike following a localized downward trend in late December. Over a 3-month horizon (Apr 4), long-term market drift and equity risk premium offset the high starting point, entirely moving our expectation to a neutral coin-flip (0.50), reflecting the instruction that uncertainty should maximize towards 0.5 for distant dates.
